User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the Desi Content Creator application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the user (matches auth.uid).

photo.description: URL of the user's profile photo.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user account was created.

lastActive.description: Timestamp of the user's last activity.

ImageGeneration.title: ImageGeneration
ImageGeneration.description: Represents an image generated by the AI.

id.description: Unique identifier for the generated image.

userId.description: The user who generated the image.

prompt.description: The text prompt used to generate the image.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the image was generated.

History.title: History
History.description: Represents a single analysis history record for a user.

userId.description: The user who initiated the analysis.

mode.description: The task mode used for the analysis (e.g., 'analyze', 'improve').

content.description: The user's original content/prompt for analysis.

result.description: The structured JSON result from the AI analysis.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the analysis was performed.

definition.description: Stores images generated by the user.
Stores analysis history for a user.
